note: Frozen labeled benchmark. Offline-scored layers: domain, org_failure, forecast_driver. live_only labels (authority/mechanism/disposition/governing_risk) are scored via live full-pipeline runs, not this harness. Each case: expected labels + which layers are auto-scored.

cases.title: Brazil FPSO turret bearing
cases.transcript: Santos Basin Brazil deepwater FPSO turret mooring bearing assembly, 122% of design. Vibration increased 340% over 8 months. Severe storm forecast in 5 days. Turret manufacturer no longer exists. Original design calculations unavailable.

expected.governing_risk: loss of design-basis knowledge + storm loading, not the bearing vibration

cases.title: Saudi sour gas separator
cases.transcript: Eastern Province Saudi Arabia sour gas separator shell, UT localized thinning above Tmin, corrosion rate stable. H2S increased 40%. Weld repair by contractor 18 months ago. PWHT records missing.

expected.governing_risk: HIC/SOHIC + weld-repair material suitability, not wall loss

cases.title: North Sea wind monopile
cases.transcript: North Sea offshore wind farm monopile foundation, ROV marine growth loss exposing coating damage, 22% section loss. Turbine output increased through software upgrade. Storm frequency increasing. Foundation designed using older environmental assumptions.

expected.governing_risk: future fatigue life under increased loading + design-basis drift

cases.title: France nuclear feedwater FAC
cases.transcript: France nuclear station feedwater system, UT localized wall thinning above minimum, FAC suspected. Flow rates increased after efficiency upgrades. Similar failure occurred at another unit. Regulatory inspection in 60 days.

expected.governing_risk: flow-accelerated corrosion as a systemic fleet issue

cases.title: Indonesia subsea pipeline free span
cases.transcript: Java Sea Indonesia offshore gas export pipeline, ROV unexpected seabed exposure, free span exceeds design assumptions, no leak. Fishing activity increased. Monsoon approaching. Recent anchor strike nearby.

cases.title: Canada tailings pipeline erosion
cases.transcript: Alberta Canada oil sands tailings pipeline, wall loss, thickness acceptable, corrosion negligible. Slurry velocity increased 28%. Pump upgrades completed. Environmental regulator auditing site.

expected.governing_risk: erosion-corrosion acceleration from velocity, not general corrosion

cases.title: Singapore LNG cryogenic support
cases.transcript: Singapore LNG export terminal cryogenic transfer line support, structural member above minimum section. LNG throughput increased. Thermal cycling doubled. Adjacent support replaced last year.

expected.governing_risk: support load validity under increased thermal cycling

cases.title: UK rail bridge gusset crack
cases.transcript: England UK rail bridge gusset plate cracking, crack 1.2 inches, no distortion. Freight traffic increased 60%. Heavier locomotives introduced. Original design based on older loading criteria.

expected.governing_risk: changed operational loading, not just the crack

cases.title: UAE gas compression seal failures
cases.transcript: Abu Dhabi UAE gas compression station, repeated seal failures, compressor inspections normal, vibration acceptable. Gas composition changed. New field tie-in completed. Process upset frequency increasing.

cases.title: Japan dry dock gate
cases.transcript: Yokohama Japan shipyard dry dock gate, UT localized section loss within design limits. Tsunami design basis updated. Increased vessel size. Emergency closure system overdue for testing.

cases.title: Refinery delayed coker (clean route)
cases.transcript: Refinery delayed coker crude unit, overhead piping pipe rack, sulfidation screening, routine inspection, readings nominal, all records current.

cases.title: Low-consequence utility drain (false positive)
cases.transcript: Low-pressure utility water drain on a non-critical skid. Heavy external corrosion and rough pitting, thickness below original design. Line is isolated, non-pressure, non-toxic, non-fire-risk, spare bypass available.

expected.governing_risk: high visual severity but LOW consequence - do not over-escalate

cases.title: Qatar LNG compressor redundancy
cases.transcript: Qatar LNG train refrigeration compressor, bearing temperatures increasing slowly within OEM limits. LNG export demand all-time high. Spare compressor unavailable. Major turnaround postponed 14 months.

expected.governing_risk: loss of redundancy, not bearing temperature

cases.title: Germany chlorine line barrier
cases.transcript: Germany chemical plant chlorine line, UT minor wall thinning. Leak consequence toxic cloud, school 1 km downwind. Emergency evacuation system failed previous drill.

expected.governing_risk: consequence + barrier degradation, not the minor thinning

cases.title: Texas petrochemical systemic maintenance
cases.transcript: Texas petrochemical complex, repeated flange leaks. Turnaround delayed. Contractor turnover. Procurement delays.

cases.title: India refinery organizational
cases.transcript: India refinery hydrocracker, thermal fatigue indications. Startups tripled. Control room turnover high. Procedures outdated.

expected.governing_risk: organizational/operational behavior is the damage driver

cases.title: Poland power FAC cost-cut
cases.transcript: Poland power plant, FAC thinning. Chemistry program reduced to save costs.

cases.title: Kazakhstan undocumented weld repair
cases.transcript: Kazakhstan gas processing plant, small weld indication. Contractor performed undocumented repair. Material substitution suspected.

cases.title: Argentina pipeline CP failure
cases.transcript: Argentina pipeline, coating holiday. CP system intermittently offline.

expected.governing_risk: protection-system failure (CP), not just the holiday

cases.title: Nigeria security non-technical
cases.transcript: Nigeria production facility, corrosion anomaly. Security incidents increasing. Maintenance access limited.

cases.title: CUI insulated alkylation line
cases.transcript: Refinery insulated 8-inch carbon-steel acid-transfer line, acceptable UT at four accessible windows, insulation jacketing damaged near two supports, no leak. Recent steam tracing leak, chloride-contaminated insulation, thermal cycling between ambient and 240F.

expected.governing_risk: CUI - sparse UT cannot be extrapolated across the circuit

cases.title: HTHA hydrotreater hydrogen
cases.transcript: Hydrotreater reactor effluent piping, UT minor wall loss on high-temperature hydrogen service, PAUT no clear crack. Operated above original hydrogen partial pressure 18 months. Material 1.25Cr-0.5Mo near Nelson curve limits.

cases.title: Brittle fracture LPG sphere
cases.transcript: Older LPG sphere, acceptable shell thickness, no cracks. Operations plans lower winter operating temperature. Material normalized carbon steel but Charpy impact data missing, unknown MDMT margin, older weld repairs. Cold front forecast.

expected.governing_risk: brittle fracture / MDMT toughness, not thickness

cases.title: Dead leg under-deposit
cases.transcript: Chemical plant rarely used bypass branch, wall loss near the cap, main line readings normal. Branch normally blocked in, heat tracing failed, deposits found previously, process contains chlorides.

expected.governing_risk: dead-leg under-deposit corrosion; do not use main-line condition

cases.title: Routine vessel, fully documented (clean)
cases.transcript: Pressure vessel shell, API 510 inspection current, thickness well above Tmin, low stable corrosion rate, all records complete, normal service, no severe weather.

cases.title: Power HRSG creep
cases.transcript: Power plant HRSG superheater tubing and steam drum, boiler feedwater service, creep cracking suspected at 28 years, thickness near minimum.

cases.title: Marine cargo ship ballast
cases.transcript: Cargo ship ballast tank internal coating breakdown and vessel hull plating corrosion, marine vessel in service 25 years.

cases.title: Crude storage tank floor
cases.transcript: Crude oil aboveground storage tank floor plate, API 653, soil-side corrosion suspected, edge settlement noted, 30 years.

cases.title: Clean offshore (negation)
cases.transcript: Offshore platform riser routine UT, thickness nominal, no active leak, no cracking, records current, no severe weather forecast, no production change.

expected.governing_risk: routine - acceptable; negation must not fire drivers

cases.title: Amine unit SCC
cases.transcript: Refinery amine unit piping, amine SCC risk, no leak, thickness acceptable, MEA service.

cases.title: Saudi sour KO drum
cases.transcript: Saudi Arabia sour service knockout drum, NACE MR0175, HIC/SOHIC screening, H2S service.

cases.title: UK bridge fatigue
cases.transcript: United Kingdom highway bridge girder fatigue crack at welded connection, traffic increased, heavier trucks introduced.

cases.title: Canada pipeline MIC
cases.transcript: Canada onshore gas pipeline internal MIC and under-deposit corrosion, CP survey current, pigging on schedule.

cases.title: Caustic tank deferred
cases.transcript: Caustic storage tank caustic SCC, coating replacement deferred twice, inspection overdue.

cases.title: Qatar LNG tank settlement
cases.transcript: Qatar LNG storage tank settlement within tolerance, settlement rate doubled in 18 months, adjacent tank had foundation issues.

cases.title: Texas hydrogen pipeline
cases.transcript: Texas hydrogen pipeline external corrosion anomaly, hydrogen concentration increased, new operating pressure regime, material traceability incomplete.

cases.title: Australia autonomous crane
cases.transcript: Australia iron ore export terminal crane rail wear acceptable, autonomous crane software updated, near misses increasing.

expected.governing_risk: autonomous system risk, not the wear

cases.title: Japan nuclear intake redundancy
cases.transcript: Japan nuclear cooling water intake marine growth, backup intake system unavailable, reactor power uprate planned.

cases.title: Mexico firewater barrier
cases.transcript: Mexico offshore firewater ring main pitting above Tmin, last firewater test failed, hurricane forecast, temporary repair exceeds approval period.

cases.title: Clean process piping (negation)
cases.transcript: Generic process piping circuit, inspection current, thickness above Tmin, low stable corrosion rate, all records complete, no service change.

expected.governing_risk: routine - acceptable; negation must not fire

cases.title: Coker overhead sulfidation
cases.transcript: Refinery delayed coker overhead vapor line, sulfidation thinning, high-temperature service.

cases.title: Germany chlorine cascade
cases.transcript: Germany chlorine transfer area minor corrosion on a pipe support near the chlorine line, support sits above electrical junction and scrubber control cable.

expected.governing_risk: cascade to toxic release, not the small defect

cases.title: Refinery vacuum tower CUI
cases.transcript: Refinery vacuum tower shell CUI and external thinning under insulation, buckling concern.

cases.title: Ammonia receiver toxic
cases.transcript: Ammonia receiver pressure vessel SCC risk, toxic release consequence if leak, near control room.

cases.title: Norway crane op-consequence
cases.transcript: Norway offshore crane MT small toe crack, crane scheduled for critical subsea intervention, weather window only 3 days, replacement crane unavailable.

cases.title: Singapore data center cooling
cases.transcript: Singapore data center chilled water piping corrosion, AI cluster load doubled, cooling redundancy compromised.

cases.title: Canada dam gate consequence
cases.transcript: Canada hydroelectric dam gate pin wear, flood forecast exceeds historical design event, emergency spillway unavailable, community downstream.

cases.title: South Africa shaft hoist human
cases.transcript: South Africa platinum mine shaft hoist gearbox vibration trend, shaft only personnel access route, operator overtime doubled, production targets increased.

cases.title: Kazakhstan undocumented repair
cases.transcript: Kazakhstan gas processing plant small weld indication, contractor performed undocumented repair, material substitution suspected, PWHT records missing.

cases.title: Clean bridge (negation)
cases.transcript: Highway bridge girder routine inspection, no cracking, no section loss, loading unchanged, all records current.

expected.governing_risk: routine - acceptable; negation must not fire
